pages.text: Craft plate-armor class. Crafts the Iron Plate, Heavy, and Warrior (Viking lamellar) armor sets; the iron, gold, and diamond kite shields; and the Lady Maria corsair-noble plate set.$(br2)Forge theme — iron plus netherite scrap. Wooden and stone armor tiers stay vanilla-craftable; netherite stays a smithing-table upgrade. Faction regalia plate is handled by the faction system, not the Armorer class.
